benchmark_name: Benchmark Standard v2: Automated Evaluation Protocol for Traceable Scholarly Discovery

validation_state_definitions.protocol_defined: Benchmark rules and schemas exist, but metrics have not necessarily been computed.
validation_state_definitions.artifact_only: Execution artifacts exist but have not passed automated v2 validation gates.
validation_state_definitions.automated_validation: Rows have passed normalization, DOI/metadata checks, gold matching, fixed LLM judge scoring, metric recomputation, and reproducibility manifest generation.

max_candidate_rows_note: 3 methods x 20 tasks x up to 20 results; design capacity, not validated row count.
